'''Draenell's Point''' was an [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] in the [[Trax sector/Legends|Trax sector]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] supplied food to both sides during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] scout [[Arnoth Draenell]] discovered the planet. The first settlements on Draenell's Point were established in about [[150 BBY/Legends|150 BBY]] by [[Merchant/Legends|traders]] using the [[Terr'skiar Pass]].

==Culture==
The planet was ruled by the [[Draenell Planetary Council]] but control was relinquished to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to spare an invasion. The seasons of Draenell's Point were named ''[[Inthulpin]]'', ''[[Thulpin]]'', ''[[Inpoll]]'', and ''[[Poll]]''.

{{Planet-stub}}
